title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入牙买加：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入牙買加：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Jamaica Bureau of Standards (BSJ) conformity requirements, Office of Utilities Regulation (OUR) interconnection requirements, Jamaica Public Service Company (JPS) grid-connection requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, IEC 63056 second-life battery requirements, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation requirements, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport requirements, and 110/220 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与牙买加标准局（BSJ）合格评定要求、公共事业委员会（OUR）并网要求、牙买加公共服务公司（JPS）电网接入要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、IEC 63056二次利用电池要求、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输要求及110/220V 50Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與牙買加標準局（BSJ）合格評定要求、公共事業委員會（OUR）併網要求、牙買加公共服務公司（JPS）電網接入要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、IEC 63056二次利用電池要求、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸要求及110/220V 50Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BSJ conformity scope determination, OUR project approval, JPS grid-connection approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current BSJ conformity requirements, OUR approval procedures, JPS grid-connection technical specifications, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BSJ合格评定范围裁定、OUR项目审批、JPS并网批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行BSJ合格评定要求、OUR审批程序、JPS并网技术规格、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BSJ合格評定範圍裁定、OUR項目審批、JPS併網批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行BSJ合格評定要求、OUR審批程序、JPS併網技術規格、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Jamaica does not yet have a comprehensive standalone mandatory BESS product safety code, and regulation is still developing. Compliance is operationalized through BSJ conformity pathways for standards-referenced documentation, OUR utility interconnection control for project operation, and JPS technical review for grid connection. As an island grid importing BESS exports from China, the practical compliance gaps are: (1) IEC 62619 safety evidence for cells and modules required by BSJ-style conformity assessment — Chinese GB 38031 / GB/T 36276 are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence; (2) IEC 62933 system-level requirements for utility interconnection; (3) IEC 63056 where second-life cells are used; (4) NFPA 855 fire-safety installation provisions for buildings and enclosures; (5) UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport documents for international sea shipping; (6) voltage configuration conversion because Jamaica uses 110/220 V 50 Hz while China uses 220/380 V 50 Hz; and (7) local import and port administration using Kingston as the principal entry point. Chinese GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 remain domestic baselines but are not accepted as standalone substitutes in Jamaica review.
answer_first.zh: 牙买加目前尚未形成完整独立的强制性BESS产品安全法规，相关制度仍在完善中。合规通常通过参考标准的BSJ合格评定路径、OUR公用事业并网管控和JPS技术审查来执行。对中国BESS出口到牙买加而言，实际差距包括：（1）BSJ类合格评定对电芯与模组IEC 62619安全证据的要求——中国GB 38031/GB/T 36276不被接受为替代；（2）并网许可中对IEC 62933系统级要求；（3）使用二次利用电芯时的IEC 63056要求；（4）建筑与安装环节的NFPA 855消防安全要求；（5）国际海运所需UN 38.3与IEC 62281文件；（6）电压配置差异，牙买加为110/220V 50Hz，而中国为220/380V 50Hz；（7）以金斯顿为主要入境口岸的本地清关和物流管理。中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是国内基准，但在牙买加审查中不能单独替代。
answer_first.zht: 牙買加目前尚未形成完整獨立的強制性BESS產品安全法規，相關制度仍在完善中。合規通常透過參考標準的BSJ合格評定途徑、OUR公用事業併網管控和JPS技術審查來執行。對中國BESS出口到牙買加而言，實際差距包括：（1）BSJ類合格評定對電芯與模組IEC 62619安全證據的要求——中國GB 38031/GB/T 36276不被接受為替代；（2）併網許可中的IEC 62933系統級要求；（3）使用二次利用電芯時的IEC 63056要求；（4）建築與安裝環節的NFPA 855消防安全要求；（5）國際海運所需UN 38.3與IEC 62281文件；（6）電壓配置差異，牙買加為110/220V 50Hz，而中國為220/380V 50Hz；（7）以金斯頓為主要入境口岸的本地清關和物流管理。中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是國內基準，但在牙買加審查中不能單獨替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
